name: graphql-grpc
description: GraphQL and gRPC API discipline: GraphQL schema design, the N+1/DataLoader problem, per-field resolver authorization, query depth/complexity limits, cursor pagination and error shaping; gRPC protobuf evolution (field-number safety), streaming, deadlines, and canonical status codes — a firing graphql-grpc skill and a /graphql-grpc:review command. Distinct paradigms from REST; defers REST to api-design.
